reviews.review_description: For it too be so cheap it sure is a lot of fun! I enjoyed and I still haven’t erased it. I like the fact that you can upgrade and try new horses with all the coins that you’ve accomplished!  It does get pretty expensive. I also like that I didn’t have to spend any of my real cash. It dos get repetitive though.

I previously gave Neon Sprint a one star review because the game was broken and froze at a blank screen... 

I'm happy to say the game has been fixed and runs great. It's a fun and wacky endless runner/rider game with nice colorful visuals, smooth controls and cool synthwave soundtrack. Campaign Mode with challenges and an Infinite Mode for high scores with leaderboards (there's also achievements). Definitely worth a buy.
